TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Collage, title = Collage, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Collage} }

S.FORM: O Collage ko tatosa a romadiway i Taywan. I Collage ci Natsuko Lariyod aci Ông Ka-koân. Misanga' ciira to Pangcah/Amis, Sowal no Holam, Sowal no Nihon, ato Sowal no Amerika a romadiw. "Collagist" han ko haliCollage'ay a tamdaw. O Histori (Kongko) I 2018 a mihecaan, namidemak ciira to "Seikai Sakacecay - Ma'orip to fa'elohay a Shiken" no Band no 'Adingo ato The Bell. I 2019 a mihecaan, o ngangan no tatosa a romadiway ci "Collage" ciira a misatapang i Soni no Lalan (StreetVoice) ato Lalan no Simal (Youtube) I 2019 a mihecaan, saka3 a folad ira ko saka27 a romi'ad, misatapang a misanga' to radiw i "N1 Party - O Raradiw no Tamdaw no Nanguaq" ko Nanguaq, Payleday Records... O Romadiway O Radiw (Songs/Raradiw) O Albums (Taradiwan) O Singles (Radiw) O Awards ato Accolades O References O Links StreetVoice Spotify O Channel no Collage O Facebook Page no Collage O Instagram no Natsuko Lariyod O Instagram no Ông Ka-koân
S.PHON: o~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə ko~u tato~usa a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj i tajwan. i ʦo~uɾɾa*ə ʦi natso~u~uko~u ɾarijo~uɬ~ɮ aʦi *ŋ ka-ko~u*n. misaŋaʡ ʦiira to~u paŋʦaħ/amis, so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam, so~uwaɾ no~u niħo~un, ato~u so~uwaɾ no~u amərika a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw. "ʦo~uɾɾa*ist" ħan ko~u ħaɾiʦo~uɾɾa*əʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u ħisto~uri (ko~uŋko~u) i **** a miħəʦaan, namiɬ~ɮəmak ʦiira to~u "səikai sakaʦəʦaj - maʡo~urip to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a sħikən" no~u b~b~vanɬ~ɮ no~u ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u ato~u tħə b~b~vəɾɾ. i **** a miħəʦaan, o~u ŋaŋan no~u tato~usa a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi "ʦo~uɾɾa*ə" ʦiira a misatapaŋ i so~uni no~u ɾaɾan (strəətb~vo~uiʦə) ato~u ɾaɾan no~u simaɾ (jo~uo~u~uto~u~ub~b~və) i **** a miħəʦaan, saka* a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u saka** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, misatapaŋ a misaŋaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw i "n* partj - o~u raraɬ~ɮiw no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u naŋo~u~ua*" ko~u naŋo~u~ua*, pajɾəɬ~ɮaj rəʦo~urɬ~ɮs... o~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj o~u raɬ~ɮiw (so~uŋs/raraɬ~ɮiw) o~u aɾb~b~vo~u~ums (taraɬ~ɮiwan) o~u siŋɾəs (raɬ~ɮiw) o~u awarɬ~ɮs ato~u aʦʦo~uɾaɬ~ɮəs o~u rəfərənʦəs o~u ɾinks strəətb~vo~uiʦə spo~utifj o~u ʦħannəɾ no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə o~u faʦəb~b~vo~uo~uk pa*ə no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə o~u insta*ram no~u natso~u~uko~u ɾarijo~uɬ~ɮ o~u insta*ram no~u *ŋ ka-ko~u*n
S.FORM: O Collage ko tatosa a romadiway i Taywan. I Collage ci Natsuko Lariyod aci Ông Ka-koân. Misanga' ciira to Pangcah/Amis, Sowal no Holam, Sowal no Nihon, ato Sowal no Amerika a romadiw. "Collagist" han ko haliCollage'ay a tamdaw. O Histori (Kongko) I 2018 a mihecaan, namidemak ciira to "Seikai Sakacecay - Ma'orip to fa'elohay a Shiken" no Band no 'Adingo ato The Bell. I 2019 a mihecaan, o ngangan no tatosa a romadiway ci "Collage" ciira a misatapang i Soni no Lalan (StreetVoice) ato Lalan no Simal (Youtube) I 2019 a mihecaan, saka3 a folad ira ko saka27 a romi'ad, misatapang a misanga' to radiw i "N1 Party - O Raradiw no Tamdaw no Nanguaq" ko Nanguaq, Payleday Records... O Romadiway O Radiw (Songs/Raradiw) O Albums (Taradiwan) O Singles (Radiw) O Awards ato Accolades O References O Links StreetVoice Spotify O Channel no Collage O Facebook Page no Collage O Instagram no Natsuko Lariyod O Instagram no Ông Ka-koân
S.PHON: o~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə ko~u tato~usa a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj i tajwan. i ʦo~uɾɾa*ə ʦi natso~u~uko~u ɾarijo~uɬ~ɮ aʦi *ŋ ka-ko~u*n. misaŋaʡ ʦiira to~u paŋʦaħ/amis, so~uwaɾ no~u ħo~uɾam, so~uwaɾ no~u niħo~un, ato~u so~uwaɾ no~u amərika a ro~umaɬ~ɮiw. "ʦo~uɾɾa*ist" ħan ko~u ħaɾiʦo~uɾɾa*əʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u ħisto~uri (ko~uŋko~u) i **** a miħəʦaan, namiɬ~ɮəmak ʦiira to~u "səikai sakaʦəʦaj - maʡo~urip to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj a sħikən" no~u b~b~vanɬ~ɮ no~u ʡaɬ~ɮiŋo~u ato~u tħə b~b~vəɾɾ. i **** a miħəʦaan, o~u ŋaŋan no~u tato~usa a ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi "ʦo~uɾɾa*ə" ʦiira a misatapaŋ i so~uni no~u ɾaɾan (strəətb~vo~uiʦə) ato~u ɾaɾan no~u simaɾ (jo~uo~u~uto~u~ub~b~və) i **** a miħəʦaan, saka* a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u saka** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, misatapaŋ a misaŋaʡ to~u raɬ~ɮiw i "n* partj - o~u raraɬ~ɮiw no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u naŋo~u~ua*" ko~u naŋo~u~ua*, pajɾəɬ~ɮaj rəʦo~urɬ~ɮs... o~u ro~umaɬ~ɮiwaj o~u raɬ~ɮiw (so~uŋs/raraɬ~ɮiw) o~u aɾb~b~vo~u~ums (taraɬ~ɮiwan) o~u siŋɾəs (raɬ~ɮiw) o~u awarɬ~ɮs ato~u aʦʦo~uɾaɬ~ɮəs o~u rəfərənʦəs o~u ɾinks strəətb~vo~uiʦə spo~utifj o~u ʦħannəɾ no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə o~u faʦəb~b~vo~uo~uk pa*ə no~u ʦo~uɾɾa*ə o~u insta*ram no~u natso~u~uko~u ɾarijo~uɬ~ɮ o~u insta*ram no~u *ŋ ka-ko~u*n
